title: Visible Composter
description: Lets you see the levels in a composter.
body:
# Desciption
This pack makes the composter model have 'glass' on the sides giving you the ability to see the level of the compost.

 ## Use
This resource pack is really useful when you need to know the exact amount of compost in a composter, but you can't see from the top normally.

 ## Issues
 Issues can be posted in the discord server. You can just join and leave the server, please don't be there to troll.
